parent_task: Harden login against null user before the billing release
objective: Return 400 instead of crashing when the login payload has no user field
problem_statement: POST /login with {} throws TypeError at login.ts where user.id is read; should be a 400.
acceptance_criteria: POST /login with an empty body returns HTTP 400

parent_task: Harden login against null user before the billing release
objective: Add a single bounded retry to the Stripe charge call on network error
problem_statement: chargeCustomer() fails permanently on transient ECONNRESET; one retry with backoff is enough.
acceptance_criteria: A transient network error triggers exactly one retry
A non-network error is not retried
